sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85013" key="polukw/tilos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-κώτῐλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85013.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">much-warbling,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀηδόνες</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">73</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
